title: Sprint 56 Wave C: Make DeniedCommands configurable via appsettings
description: The DeniedCommands HashSet in AgentBackgroundService.cs is a static hardcoded set of 45+ blocked Minecraft server commands. This needs to be configurable via appsettings.json (Agent:Safety section) using the standard Options pattern, so users can add/remove commands without recompiling. Follows the existing pattern from RestMemoryGatewayOptions and ChatOptions (sealed record with init properties). The default values preserve the existing hardcoded list.
